ref: It is important to fill out the form
expl: Benar. Kalimat utama 'It is important to fill out the form' sudah lengkap, dan 'that you have been instructed' adalah adjective clause yang menerangkan noun 'the way'. Struktur benar.

ref: The car which I have been driving
expl: Salah. Subjek 'The car' tidak memiliki verb utama — 'which I have been driving for five years' hanyalah adjective clause. Seharusnya: 'The car which I have been driving for five years IS for sale at a really good price.'

ref: I just finished reading the novel whom
expl: Salah. 'whom' hanya digunakan untuk orang, sedangkan 'the novel' adalah benda. Seharusnya menggunakan 'which' atau 'that': '...the novel WHICH/THAT the professor suggested...'

ref: The plane that he was scheduled
expl: Benar. 'that he was scheduled to take to Hawaii' adalah adjective clause yang menerangkan 'The plane', dan verb utama kalimat adalah 'was delayed'. Struktur lengkap dan benar.

ref: The movie which we watched on cable
expl: Salah. Ada pronoun 'it' yang redundan. Subjek kalimat sudah 'The movie' (diterangkan oleh adjective clause 'which we watched on cable last night'), sehingga verb utama harus langsung mengikuti: '...last night WAS really frightening.'

ref: The ice cream that is served
expl: Benar. 'that' berfungsi sebagai connector sekaligus subject dari clause 'that is served in the restaurant', dan verb utama kalimat adalah 'has'. Struktur lengkap dan benar.

ref: The cars are trying to enter
expl: Salah. Ada dua verb ('are trying' dan 'are lined up') tanpa connector yang menghubungkan. Seharusnya: 'The cars THAT are trying to enter the freeway system are lined up for blocks.' ('that' menjadi connector/subject).

ref: I have a great respect for everyone who
expl: Salah. Clause 'who on the Dean's List' tidak memiliki verb. 'who' di sini berfungsi sebagai connector/subject sehingga butuh verb: '...everyone who IS on the Dean's List.'

ref: It is going to be very difficult
expl: Salah. 'which' hanya untuk benda, sedangkan 'the man' adalah orang. Seharusnya 'who': '...to work with the man WHO just began working here.'

ref: The door that leads to the fault
expl: Salah. Ada pronoun 'it' yang redundan. Subjek kalimat sudah 'The door' (diterangkan adjective clause 'that leads to the fault'), sehingga seharusnya: 'The door that leads to the fault WAS tightly locked.'
